text:
Created attachment 247386
WIP Update to 4.1.2

Hello,

A potential databases/pgadmin4 Port requires an updated py-bcrypt, via py-Flask-Security-Too (local worktree). Attached is the current Work In Progress (WIP) patch, however, I am stuck with configuring the Port to handle the external dependencies that bcrypt-rust requires.
